parameters.query: SELECT id FROM submissions WHERE channel_message_id = $1 AND $1 IS NOT NULL AND $1 <> '' LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().filter(i => i.json && i.json.id !== undefined && i.json.id !== null);
return [{ json: { is_duplicate: rows.length > 0 } }];
return [{ json: { mode: 'duplicate', ack_text: '', followup_text: '', voice_url: null, submission_ids: [], public_ids: [] } }];

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS recent FROM submissions s JOIN citizens c ON c.id = s.citizen_id WHERE c.channel = $1 AND c.channel_user_id = $2 AND s.created_at > now() - interval '1 hour';
SELECT id, name, aliases, geom FROM wards;

SELECT s.id, COALESCE(s.language,'hi') AS language FROM submissions s JOIN citizens c ON c.id = s.citizen_id WHERE c.channel = $1 AND c.channel_user_id = $2 AND s.ward_resolution = 'pending' AND s.created_at > now() - interval '30 minutes' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().filter(i => i.json && i.json.id !== undefined && i.json.id !== null);
return [{ json: { pending: rows.length > 0, pending_id: rows.length ? rows[0].json.id : null, pending_language: rows.length ? rows[0].json.language : 'hi' } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE submissions SET ward_id = $1, ward_resolution = $2, location_text = COALESCE($3, location_text) WHERE id = $4 RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO events (ref_type, ref_id, kind, payload) VALUES ('submission', $1, 'ward_update', jsonb_build_object('resolution', $2));

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Resolve Ward From Reply').first().json.submission_id }},{{ $('Resolve Ward From Reply').first().json.ward_resolution }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO citizens (channel, channel_user_id, ward_id, language) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (channel, channel_user_id) DO UPDATE SET ward_id = COALESCE(citizens.ward_id, EXCLUDED.ward_id), language = EXCLUDED.language RETURNING id, ward_id;

SELECT s.id, s.ask, s.category, s.created_at::date AS created_on,
  COALESCE(r.status, CASE WHEN ts.theme_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'under_review' ELSE 'received' END) AS status
FROM submissions s
JOIN citizens c ON c.id = s.citizen_id
LEFT JOIN theme_submissions ts ON ts.submission_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN recommendations r ON r.theme_id = ts.theme_id
WHERE c.channel = $1 AND c.channel_user_id = $2
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR s.id = NULLIF(regexp_replace($3, '\D', '', 'g'), '')::int)
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT s.category, COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM submissions s WHERE s.ward_id = $1 AND $1 IS NOT NULL AND s.created_at > now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY s.category ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5;

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Parse & Route').first().json;
return [{ json: { mode: 'conversation', ack_text: p.ack_text, followup_text: '', voice_url: null, submission_ids: [], public_ids: [] } }];

const filename = $('Prepare Binary').first().json.media_filename;
return [{ json: { media_ref: `https://YOUR_SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/media/${filename}` } }];
return [{ json: { media_ref: null } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'models/gemini-embedding-001', content: { parts: [{ text: $json.category + ': ' + $json.ask }] }, outputDimensionality: 768 }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS similar_count FROM submissions WHERE ward_id = $1 AND $1 IS NOT NULL AND category = $2 AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND $3::text IS NOT NULL AND embedding <=> $3::vector < 0.35;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Upsert Citizen').first().json.id }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.channel }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.media_type }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.text }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.transcript }},{{ $json.media_ref }},{{ $json.ask }},{{ $json.category }},{{ $json.sub_type }},{{ $json.urgency_signals }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.language }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.lat }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.lng }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.location_text }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.ward_id }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.ward_resolution }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.severity }},{{ $('Parse & Route').first().json.channel_message_id }},{{ $json.embedding_str }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO events (ref_type, ref_id, kind, payload) VALUES ('submission', $1, 'created', jsonb_build_object('channel', $2, 'severity', $3));

parameters.text: =🚨 CRITICAL submission {{ $json.public_ids.join(', ') }} — severity: {{ $json.severity }}. Check the dashboard immediately.
